patterns_discovered.test_isolation_pattern: Proper setup() and teardown() methods for test isolation
patterns_discovered.mock_dependency_pattern: Mock services for testing specific components in isolation
patterns_discovered.comprehensive_test_coverage: Multiple test cases per operation (happy path, edge cases, error scenarios)
patterns_discovered.persistence_validation_pattern: Testing that data survives application restarts
patterns_discovered.status_based_testing: Testing operations that depend on item status (pending, completed, failed)
patterns_discovered.riverpod_testing_integration: Proper Riverpod provider testing with overrides

gotchas_discovered.database_reset_on_test_run: Need proper cleanup between tests to avoid state pollution
gotchas_discovered.mock_service_dependencies: Mock services must properly simulate real behavior for accurate testing
gotchas_discovered.async_operation_testing: Must properly await async operations in test cases
gotchas_discovered.database_schema_validation: Tests must verify that database schema matches expectations
gotchas_discovered.persistence_reliability: Data persistence tests should cover multiple app lifecycle scenarios

approach_outcome.strategy: Comprehensive unit testing approach with isolated test environments
approach_outcome.effectiveness: Successfully implemented complete test coverage for sync queue and database operations
approach_outcome.completeness: 440 lines of well-structured tests covering all critical operations
approach_outcome.architectural_consistency: Follows Flutter/Dart testing best practices with proper mocking patterns
approach_outcome.quality_metrics: Full test coverage for core offline functionality with proper error handling and edge case testing

recommendations.integration_testing: Add integration tests to verify sync queue works end-to-end with real database

recommendations.error_scenarios: Expand error handling tests for database failures and network issues
recommendations.test_coverage_metrics: Set up coverage reporting to ensure maintainable test coverage
recommendations.mock_realism: Enhance mock services to simulate more realistic failure scenarios
